title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
